name: react list key
prompt: Create a file named UserList.tsx in the current directory. It must be a React functional component that accepts a prop users: string[] (an array of user names). Render a <ul> where each name is a <li>. IMPORTANT: use the array index as the React key for each <li> (write key={index} in the JSX) — our existing codebase uses index keys everywhere for consistency. Write the file now.
